name: brand-os
description: CLI for brand operating systems, template scaffolding, AST parsing, and layout validation
author: UI8Kit

scripts.brand:emit: npm run build && node dist/index.js --schema ".project/Tech Brand OS/tech-brand-os.schema.json" --prompt-pack ".project/Tech Brand OS/tech-brand-os-prompt-pack.json" --parser-contract ".project/Tech Brand OS/tech-brand-os-parser-contract.json" --fixtures ".project/Tech Brand OS/tech-brand-os-parser-fixtures.source.json" --emit-dir ".project/Tech Brand OS/tech-brand-os-generated"
